'''Templeton''' was a [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] in the [[Imperial Senate/Legends|Imperial Senate]] who was exiled to the [[Prison/Legends|prison]] [[Moon/Legends|moon]] [[Captivity]] by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. Falling in with the group led by the former [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] [[Captain/Legends|captain]], [[Dedelin]], Templton was eventually rescued by [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] agents. Along, with [[Farazzish]], Templeton was only one of two senators still surviving on the planet, and had been imprisoned before the Alliance had flourished. News of an organized resistance to the Empire excited the former Senator.

==Appearances==
*{{WEGCite|story=To Free the Forgotten|book=The Star Wars Rules Companion}} {{1st}}
